EmailTemplate.description: Response to request for 'To Whom It May Concern' letter.
EmailTemplate.name: TWIMC
EmailTemplate.subject: Your Requested Letter
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
As requested, please find your 'To Whom It May Concern' letter attached.
If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact us.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
